name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's complete AI PM operating system — 80 skills across thinking, judgment, craft, research, writing, presentations, design systems, and admin. Includes the rtp-aipm-orchestrator (commands all 80 skills + the wider Claude Code plugin ecosystem as expert agents), 62 AIPM skills in 7 layers (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-and-trust, agent-design, eval-and-quality, craft), 17 general-purpose skills, and 10 slash commands. Designed to install once and absorb the full RTP skill library on any machine. Companion plugin manifest at COMPANION-PLUGINS.md documents the wider ecosystem (superpowers, compound-engineering, pm-skills, anthropic-skills) the orchestrator commands.
